'''And-Yees''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] wanted by the [[Republic Security Force/Legends|Republic Security Force]]. The RSF indicated in their bounty notice that he was a trained [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] and sharpshooter, and that his last known sighting was on [[Gromas/Legends|Gromas]]. The [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] eventually claimed Yees' bounty on [[Outland Transit Station]] after learning that he was among the hired guns employed by one of his other bounties, [[Meeko Ghintee]]. Despite attempting to resist capture with his [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]], the Gran was captured and turned over for his bounty. And-Yees' relation to the similarly named [[Ree-Yees/Legends|Ree-Yees]] is unknown.

==Behind the scenes==
His name was inspired by the lead tester for ''Bounty Hunter''. And-Yees is the third [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] located in the second level of Chapter One. He is worth 1,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 750 credits dead.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
